query: heavy 35mm film grain noise texture analog photography
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: heavy 35mm grain, noise textures, gritty analog

response.objective_caption: An abstract composition featuring dense black granular texture against a pale beige background, with speckled particles forming vertical bands that create a gradient-like transition from solid dark areas to scattered lighter regions.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract, heavily grainy composition in muted beige and near-black tones, where photographic texture dissolves into dense particulate noise and speckled bands, abandoning representational clarity in favor of raw material and tonal gesture.
